case_title: PRYGA, BOGDAN VS LYON, STEPHEN C.

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY PRYGA, BOGDAN AS TO DEFENDANT LYON, STEPHEN C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRYGA, BOGDAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LYON, STEPHEN C. $2,557.96 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,596.96 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LYON, STEPHEN C.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LYON, STEPHEN C.
